risk_flags: High Service Charges: Serviced apartments under the DAMAC Maison brand carry significantly higher service charges (often 30-50% higher than standard residential towers in Downtown), which will heavily compress net rental yields.

Developer Discount: DAMAC properties in Downtown historically trade at a discount compared to Emaar-developed master communities due to secondary market preferences and historical maintenance standards.

Traffic Congestion: Located directly on Mall Street, the immediate vicinity suffers from severe traffic bottlenecks during peak hours, weekends, and Dubai Mall events, impacting resident accessibility.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 1,749 per sqft, this property trades at a massive 32.4% discount to the Downtown Dubai market median of AED 2,587 per sqft. This low entry point offers strong downside protection and capital appreciation potential. Given its 'Vacant Now' status, turnkey furnished condition, and immediate proximity to Dubai Mall, the optimal investment strategy is short-term holiday home rentals, which can absorb the high service charges and generate double-digit gross yields. It represents an undervalued asset for cash-flow-focused investors willing to manage serviced-apartment operational costs.

AED 15,950,000 | 4 Bedrooms | 5 Bathrooms | 9,760 sqft | Jumeirah Park, Dubai

Rare and Highly

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a premium 4-bedroom villa boasting a highly desirable direct lake view and situated on one of the largest plots (9,760 sqft) in its actual location. While the listing is erroneously categorized under the ultra-luxury 'Emirates Hills' area, the description confirms it is located in 'Jumeirah Park'. Jumeirah Park is an established, high-end family community, where properties with direct lake views and oversized plots command a healthy premium due to scarcity.
risk_flags: Critical Location Mismatch: The property is categorized under 'Emirates Hills' but is actually located in 'Jumeirah Park'. This distorts the market median comparison (AED 2,936/sqft for Emirates Hills vs. typically lower rates in Jumeirah Park).

Area Metric Confusion: The 9,760 sqft figure likely represents the plot size, not the Built-Up Area (BUA). Standard 4-bedroom villas in Jumeirah Park typically have a BUA of 3,500 to 4,300 sqft. If BUA is used, the actual price per sqft is significantly higher than the stated AED 1,634.

Overpricing Risk: At AED 15,950,000, this is at the absolute ceiling for Jumeirah Park 4-bedroom villas, even with a large plot and lake view. The investment yield (ROI) will be compressed compared to standard Jumeirah Park assets.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: From an investment perspective, this listing presents a high-risk profile due to misleading data. It is marketed using Emirates Hills' premium market metrics to make a Jumeirah Park property look heavily discounted (AED 1,634/sqft vs AED 2,936/sqft median). In reality, AED 15.95M is an ultra-premium price for Jumeirah Park. While the massive plot and direct lake view offer genuine lifestyle value and scarcity, an investor should value this asset strictly against Jumeirah Park historical transactions. Expect lower rental yields due to the high capital entry point, making this more of an end-user trophy home than a high-yielding investment.

title: 4BR Villa Resale | Waterfront Community | Oasis #1 Broker
description: Step into a world of elegance at Palmiera – The Oasis by Emaar, where luxury flows as freely

ai_analysis.quality_context: Palmiera at The Oasis is a flagship ultra-luxury master development by Emaar, Dubai's premier developer, ensuring top-tier construction quality, premium amenities, and strong community management. The community features swimmable lagoons and lush green landscapes. Note that while the listing is tagged under 'Me'aisem 2', this is a geographical misclassification; The Oasis is a distinct, newly emerging luxury corridor located further inland along Al Yalayis Street.
risk_flags: Area Metric Discrepancy: The 9,523 sqft figure almost certainly refers to the Plot Area rather than the Built-Up Area (BUA). Calculating the price per sqft (1,029 AED) on plot size artificially deflates the rate. The actual BUA for a 4BR Palmiera villa is typically around 5,100 to 6,200 sqft, meaning the true price per BUA sqft is likely much closer to or above the market median of 1,620 AED.

High Upfront Cash Requirement: As an off-plan resale, the buyer must pay the seller's paid-up equity, the agreed premium, the 4% DLD fee, and the 2% agency commission upfront in cash, before taking over the remaining Emaar payment plan.

Broker Listing Hygiene: The mismatch between the community name (The Oasis) and the registered area (Me'aisem 2) suggests a proxy listing or inaccurate data entry, requiring strict verification of the unit's SPA (Sales and Purchase Agreement).
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this property presents an attractive 36% discount relative to the market median price per sqft. However, this discount is a structural illusion caused by using Plot Area instead of Built-Up Area (BUA) for the calculation. Once adjusted to actual BUA, the pricing will likely align with current market rates. Nonetheless, securing a 4BR villa in Emaar's Palmiera at this absolute price point (~9.8M AED) represents a solid long-term investment, as The Oasis is positioned to become one of Dubai's premier high-end villa communities, offering strong capital appreciation potential upon handover.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Altura 1, Waada within the rapidly expanding Dubai South district, this 401 sqft studio represents a highly competitive entry point. At AED 1,294 per sqft, the property is priced approximately 31% below the area's market median of AED 1,875 per sqft. The inclusion of a 2-year post-handover payment plan significantly enhances its appeal, offering buyers financial leverage in a high-growth zone anchored by the Al Maktoum International Airport expansion and Expo City.
risk_flags: The significant discount to the market median (AED 1,294 vs. AED 1,875) may indicate a less premium sub-developer, a less desirable unit view/floor, or an urgent liquidation by the seller.
Resale transaction complexity, requiring strict verification that the original buyer has cleared all due milestone payments with the developer before transfer.
Potential handover delays, which are common in newly developing master communities like Dubai South.
Initial rental yields may face downward pressure until surrounding infrastructure and community amenities in the Waada sub-locality are fully completed.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This resale studio is an opportunistic buy for value-driven investors. Priced well below the market median at AED 1,294/sqft and paired with a highly desirable 2-year post-handover payment plan, it offers strong potential for capital appreciation as Dubai South matures. The low absolute ticket size (approximately AED 519,000) combined with flexible payment terms makes it an excellent asset for high-leverage yield generation or mid-term capital gains, provided developer credentials and payment histories are thoroughly vetted.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a spacious 1-bedroom apartment (875 sqft, which is above the JVC average of 700-800 sqft) offered at AED 937 per sqft. This represents a massive 34.5% discount compared to the JVC market median of AED 1,432 per sqft. Being vacant, ready to move in, and situated on a high floor with good natural light makes it highly attractive for immediate leasing or end-use. However, the steep discount suggests the building may belong to an older, lower-tier developer, as premium new-builds in JVC currently drive the higher market median.
risk_flags: Significant underpricing relative to the market median may indicate underlying building quality issues, poor maintenance, or active litigation within the homeowners' association.
Potential for high outstanding service charges owed by the current owner which must be cleared before transfer.

The JVC market median of AED 1,432/sqft is heavily skewed by premium off-plan and recently handed-over projects; legacy secondary market properties in JVC typically trade lower, meaning the actual 'like-for-like' discount may be narrower than 34.5%.
Older buildings in JVC often suffer from chiller system inefficiencies or high district cooling fees, which can negatively impact net rental yields.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied purchase price of approximately AED 820,000, this property presents a highly lucrative value-add or high-yield buy-to-let opportunity. Given its vacant status and generous size, it can be immediately rented out. Assuming a conservative market rent of AED 65,000 to 75,000 per annum for a large 1-bed in JVC, the investor can expect a strong gross rental yield of 7.9% to 9.1%. If physical due diligence clears the building of major structural or maintenance issues, this is an immediate 'buy' for yield-seeking investors looking for a low entry point in a high-demand rental hub.

title: Full Lake and Skyline Views | Huge Plot
description: Engel and Voelkers is pleased to present this stunning 4-bedroom villa in Jumeirah Islands. Boasting one of the largest plots on the lake, this villa offers a generous built-up area of 5,500 sq. ft.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property boasts highly desirable features, including full lake and skyline views, situated on an expansive plot of 12,693 sqft. While the built-up area (BUA) is modest at 5,500 sqft, the massive plot-to-BUA ratio offers significant potential for capital appreciation through villa extension, renovation, or complete redevelopment in a premium waterfront setting.
risk_flags: Location Discrepancy: Listed under 'Emirates Hills' but the description explicitly states it is located in 'Jumeirah Islands', which has a lower market median price.
Size Discrepancy: The listed 12,693 sqft represents the plot size, while the actual built-up area (BUA) is only 5,500 sqft. Price per sqft metrics are likely skewed.
Valuation Distortion: Comparing this property to the Emirates Hills market median of AED 3,062/sqft is highly misleading if the property is actually in Jumeirah Islands.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: While the nominal price of AED 2,127 per sqft looks highly attractive against the Emirates Hills median of AED 3,062, this is a false signal due to a critical location mismatch (Jumeirah Islands vs. Emirates Hills) and plot vs. BUA calculation errors. The real investment thesis relies on acquiring a prime lake-facing Jumeirah Islands plot with high redevelopment potential. Investors must re-price the asset using Jumeirah Islands BUA benchmarks to determine true market value.

Azizi Plaza is a modern residential tower located in the vibrant community of Al Furjan. Developed by Azizi Developments, the mid-rise building offers fully furnished studios, 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments designed for comfortable living. Residents enjoy amenities such as a swimming pool, gym, children’s play area, covered parking, and 24-hour security, along with easy access to major roads, the metro, and nearby daily conveniences.

Al Furjan is a well-established residential community in Dubai developed by Nakheel. The area offers a mix of villas, townhouses, and modern apartment buildings, making it popular with both families and professionals. It features landscaped streets, parks, schools, supermarkets, and easy access to major roads such as Sheikh Zayed Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road. With nearby metro stations, shopping centers, and close proximity to Dubai Marina and Jebel Ali, Al Furjan provides residents with a convenient and well-connected lifestyle.

- Exclusive

AED 2,650,000

 
For more details please contact: Jamie Grimshaw
Email Address: jamie@luxuryinvestgroup.com
 
 
 
Dorra Bay is a 22 storey residential building which was proudly developed by Cayan Group with handover taking place in 2007. The location is super prime as it is located directly on the waterfront of Dubai Marina and is only a couple of minutes walk to the public beach at JBR. Sitting adjacent to the Address Beach Resort, it is within walking distance of some of the best restaurants in the whole of Dubai as well as being in close proximity to the world famous JBR walk and Dubai Marina Mall. Due to its positioning, there is easy access in and out of Dubai Marina via Sheikh Zayed Road.
 
The tower benefits from an abundance of amenities which include state of the art gymnasium, large swimming pool, BBQ area, on-site retails, a large kids outdoor play area and much more.

description:
Experience elevated living at Carmel Residence by UNiEstate, a boutique low-density development located in the heart of Jumeirah Village Circle. This spacious 2-bedroom apartment offers well-designed living space with thoughtfully crafted interiors, making it an excellent choice for families, professionals, and investors seeking comfort, privacy, and strong ROI potential.

Overlooking the community pool, the apartment enjoys a serene setting and a relaxed lifestyle within one of JVC’s most desirable residential developments. The intelligently designed layout features bright open-plan living areas, floor-to-ceiling windows, contemporary finishes, a large private balcony, and a semi-furnished setup ready for modern living.

title: Leased & Fully Furnished | Turnkey Investor Deal
raw_area: The Pulse Residence B2, The Pulse Residence, The Pulse, Dubai South (Dubai World Central), Dubai
description:
Secure immediate cash flow from day one. Perched on the 8th floor of the highly sought-after The Pulse Residence B2 in Dubai South, this beautifully maintained 639.91 sq. ft. 1-bedroom apartment is sold fully furnished and currently leased. This is the ultimate "set-and-forget" property for an investor wanting to instantly add a high-yield, income-generating asset to their portfolio without the hassle of a vacancy gap.
### Property Specifications
Type: 1-Bedroom Apartment
Location: Tower B2, The Pulse Residences, Dubai South
Floor: 8th Floor (High Floor)
Size: 639.91 sq. ft.
Parking: 1 Dedicated Covered Space
Furnishing: Fully Furnished (Premium modern furniture & appliances included)
Status: Leased / Generating Income
### Why This is a Top-Tier Investor Asset
Immediate ROI: No waiting for handovers or marketing for tenants. Income generation begins the exact moment ownership transfers.
Premium Furnishing Included: Fully fitted out with contemporary, tasteful furniture and high-quality appliances, drastically increasing the underlying value and long-term rental appreciation.
Elevated 8th Floor Positioning: Being on a high floor means the unit benefits from great privacy, minimal street-level disruption, and plenty of natural daylight via floor-to-ceiling windows.
Low-Maintenance Layout: An efficient square footprint featuring a spacious open-plan living/dining hall, private balcony, master bedroom with extensive built-in wardrobes, and a clean semi-open kitchen.
### The Pulse Community Perks
Lifestyle Assets: Access to large temperature-controlled swimming pools, premium health clubs, and fully equipped gyms.
Convenience Hub: Ground-floor retail promenade featuring major supermarkets, cafes, restaurants, laundry facilities, and pharmacies.
Security & Management: 24/7 dedicated lobby concierge, secure access-controlled elevators, and full CCTV surveillance.

description:
Located in the ever-popular Habtoor City, this spacious 3-bedroom apartment with a maid's room is available for sale with Christie's International Real Estate Dubai. Totalling 1965.06 sq. ft., the unit offers a great investment opportunity.

Gracing Al Habtoor City and the famed Dubai skyline are three luxurious residential towers – Noora, Amna and Meera. Housed within two 73-storey towers and one 52-storey tower, the stylish apartments include 12 penthouses, three of which are VIP penthouses.

Designed in striking Art Deco style, the Residence Collection symbolises heritage and refinement, yet each home features ultra-modern fittings and fixtures. The sophisticated exterior lends each tower an unforgettable sense of grandeur. They blend harmoniously into the Dubai skyline, further adding to its world renowned beauty. Private balconies and huge floor-to-ceiling windows throughout the homes afford panoramic views and ample natural light.

Residents have access to unparalleled amenities including lap pools, gyms, spas, shopping facilities and a clinic, all within the ultra-private confines of the luxury development.

description:
Fully furnished and currently rented, this 2-bedroom apartment in Tenora presents an excellent investment opportunity with immediate rental income and strong long-term appreciation potential within one of Dubai’s fastest-growing master communities.

Located in the heart of Dubai South, the property benefits from ongoing infrastructure development and increasing demand driven by the expansion of Al Maktoum International Airport, Expo City Dubai, and the wider commercial and logistics hub surrounding the area. As the community continues to mature, Dubai South is expected to see significant capital growth, making this an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.
The apartment offers a practical open-plan layout with bright living spaces, modern finishes, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a fitted kitchen. The unit is fully furnished and well suited to both end users and long-term tenants.

Community Description & Facilities:

DAMAC Hills is one of Dubai’s most recognized master-planned residential communities, offering a blend of luxury living, green landscapes, and a family-oriented lifestyle. Developed by DAMAC Properties, the community is located in Dubai Land and has become a popular choice for both residents and investors seeking a balance between tranquility and urban connectivity.

DAMAC Hills represents a modern approach to suburban living in Dubai. It combines luxury housing with extensive green spaces, world-class amenities, and a family-friendly environment. Whether it’s the golf course views, the abundance of recreational facilities, or the peaceful atmosphere, the community offers a distinctive lifestyle that sets it apart from many other developments in the city. While it may not suit those seeking a fast-paced urban experience, it is an excellent choice for individuals and families looking for comfort, space, and a high-quality living environment in Dubai.

Call Betterhomes for further details and viewing

title: Eid Offer | Lowest | One Bed | Brand New | Ready
description:
Living in Arjan feels like stepping into a vibrant, blooming oasis designed for modern urban life. This particular 1-bedroom apartment captures that essence perfectly, offering an inviting space to call home without compromising on style or comfort. With 757 square feet of thoughtfully arranged living space, it presents a harmonious blend of functionality and elegance, ideal for those who appreciate both convenience and sophistication. The apartment’s semi-furnished layout provides a delightful foundation for personal expression. 

 A private balcony serves as your personal retreat, perfect for morning coffee or quiet evenings under the stars. The building features a stylish lobby that sets the tone for refined living, while the shared pool and spa offer perfect spots for relaxation. For fitness enthusiasts, the state-of-the-art gym and children’s play area cater to all ages, and the barbecue area provides a communal space for sharing meals with neighbors. Security ensures peace of mind around the clock. 

Arjan itself is a thriving community nestled within Dubailand, offering a peaceful yet dynamic lifestyle. Just minutes away lie the stunning Dubai Miracle Garden and Dubai Butterfly Garden, perfect for nature walks or photo opportunities. The area is well-connected, with easy access to Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road and Umm Suqeim Road, placing major attractions, schools, clinics, and entertainment hubs within comfortable reach. 

Nearby malls such as My City Centre Al Barsha provide everything from retail therapy to dining options, ensuring daily needs are met effortlessly. Priced at AED 999,900, this apartment represents a compelling opportunity for both residents and investors. The combination of strategic location, premium amenities, and modern design makes it a standout choice in Arjan. Don’t miss the chance to secure a piece of this vibrant community—schedule a viewing today and envision the life you’ll create here.

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities. 

Property Features:
- Spacious Balcony
- Fully fitted Kitchen
- Laundry Room & Storage Space
- Allotted Covered Parking Space
- 24 hours Concierge
- Infinity pools & Hi-Tech Gymnasium
- Basketball Court & Paddle Court
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

title: High Floor | Exclusive | Great Layout | Near Metro
developer_name: premium amenities including a swimming pool
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to present this spacious one-bedroom apartment in Green Lakes 2, one of the most sought-after residential towers in Jumeirah Lake Towers (JLT). Offering a high-floor position, stunning Marina skyline views, and direct Metro access, this property is ideal for both end users and investors.

The apartment features a well-designed layout with generous living spaces, elegant wood flooring, and large windows that fill the home with natural light. A private balcony provides the perfect space to relax while enjoying panoramic city views. The spacious bedroom offers comfort and practicality, while the overall layout maximizes functionality and everyday living.

Property Features:

High Floor
Exclusive Listing
Spacious Layout
Marina Skyline Views
Wood Flooring
Private Balcony
Direct Access to Metro
Excellent Building Facilities

Residents benefit from premium amenities including a swimming pool, fully equipped gymnasium, children's play areas, 24-hour security, and covered parking.

Located in the heart of Jumeirah Lake Towers, Green Lakes is widely regarded as one of the community's premier residential developments. JLT offers a vibrant lifestyle with scenic lakes, landscaped parks, retail outlets, restaurants, cafés, and excellent connectivity to Dubai Marina, Sheikh Zayed Road, and key business districts.

This is a fantastic opportunity to secure a quality home in one of Dubai's most established waterfront communities.

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

Location and Connectivity:

Belgravia Square is an Ellington Properties development nestled within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities. Developed by Nakheel, JVC is home to over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, sports courts, and a vibrant selection of cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets. Circle Mall, the community's main retail hub, places everyday conveniences within easy reach.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers seamless connectivity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Media City, and Dubai Internet City. The building's location in District 14 places residents close to several reputable schools and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal home for professionals and families alike.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
developer_name: a podium and feature a stunning fa
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations. 

Property Features:
- Low Floor
- 800.73 Sq. Ft. 
- Ready to Move In
- Community View
- Fully Furnished and Equipped
- Swimming Pool & Gym
- Allotted Basement Parking Space
- Close to Restaurants, Shops, Mall
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.
